english_description: A read-only view of a node stored inside an owning tree. The view reports local topology facts without changing the owner storage.

queries.english: How many child views are visible?
Is this view positioned at a leaf?

constraints.english: A visible node has at most two children.
A visible leaf reports zero children.

adversary_table.scenario: The owning tree exposes a node view after a third child was attached.
adversary_table.resolution: The owning tree rejects the malformed storage state before exposing the view.
